name: Baby Pear Tomatoes and Brie
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Baby pear tomatoes (red and yellow)
1 to 2 tbsp. snipped fresh herbs (choose from basil, oregano, marjoram)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch microwave-safe pie plate or quiche dish with fresh herb sprigs.
2. Place the Brie cheese over the herbs in the dish.
3. Using the tip of a paring knife, score the top of the cheese in a diamond pattern.
4. Generously sprinkle the cheese with black pepper.
5. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power (high) for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes or until the cheese just starts to melt.
6. Arrange the tomatoes around the melted Brie.
7. Sprinkle the cheese and tomatoes with the snipped herbs.
8. Cook for an additional 1 minute on high until the tomatoes are warm.
9. Cut the brie into wedges; serve with tomatoes and bread.
Makes 4 to 6 appetizer servings.
